    function logShoppableMetrics(moduleName, showsAddToCart) {
        if (window.ue && window.ue.count) {
            window.ue.count("aplus:shoppable:" + moduleName + ":addToCart", showsAddToCart ? 1 : 0);
        }
    }

                                                                        <div class="a-section a-spacing-none premium-aplus premium-aplus-module-13">                                     <div class="a-section a-spacing-none aplus-carousel-container"> <div id="premium-aplus-13-carousel-6-id" data-a-carousel-options="{&quot;peek_percentage&quot;:0,&quot;minimum_gutter_width&quot;:0,&quot;show_partial_next&quot;:false,&quot;name&quot;:&quot;premium-aplus-13-carousel-6&quot;}" aria-label="Featured content carousel" aria-roledescription="carousel" data-a-display-strategy="single" data-a-transition-strategy="slideCircular" role="region" aria-roledescription="carousel" class="a-begin a-carousel-container a-carousel-static a-carousel-display-single a-carousel-transition-slideCircular"><input autocomplete="on" type="hidden" class="a-carousel-firstvisibleitem"/>  <div class="a-row a-carousel-controls a-carousel-row a-carousel-has-buttons a-carousel-overlay-buttons a-carousel-rounded-buttons"><div class="a-carousel-row-inner"><div class="a-carousel-col a-carousel-left"><a class="a-carousel-goto-prevpage" role="button" href="#"><i class="a-icon a-icon-previous-rounded"><span class="a-icon-alt">Previous page</span></i></a></div><div class="a-carousel-col a-carousel-center"><div class="a-carousel-viewport" aria-roledescription="slide"><ol class="a-carousel" role="list">     <li aria-roledescription="slide" class="a-carousel-card aplus-carousel-element" aria-setsize="4"> <div id="premium-aplus-13-carousel-6-slide-0">

    display: inline-block;
    list-style: none;

.aplus-mantle.aplus-module .carousel-slider-circle {
    display: inline-block;
    cursor: pointer;
    height: 15px;
    width: 15px;
    border: 1px solid #000;
    border-radius: 20px;
    background-color: #fff;
    margin-left: 5px;

.aplus-mantle.aplus-module .carousel-slider-circle.aplus-carousel-active {

.aplus-mantle.aplus-module .aplus-pagination-dot--display-none {
    display: none;

  <script>

P.now("premium-aplus-13-carousel-6").execute("init-pagination-carousel", function(init) {
    if (init) {
        return;
    }
    P.register("premium-aplus-13-carousel-6", function() {
        return function() {
            P.when("A", "jQuery", "a-carousel-framework", "ready").execute("paginate-carousel", function (A, $, framework) {
                const ENTER_KEY_CODE = 13;
                const ESCAPE_KEY_CODE = 27;
                const LEFT_ARROW_KEY = 37;
                const RIGHT_ARROW_KEY = 39;
                const HOME_KEY = 36;
                const END_KEY = 35;

                var moduleId = "6";
                var carouselName = "premium-aplus-13-carousel-6";
                var paginationAction = "aplus-pagination-dot-action-" + moduleId + "-" + carouselName;
                var paginationGroup = "#aplus-pagination-group-" + moduleId + "-" + carouselName;

                /* If the carousel goes to a new page */
                A.on("a:carousel:"+carouselName+":change:pageNumber", function (data) {
                    A.$(paginationGroup+" .carousel-slider-circle").removeClass("aplus-carousel-active").attr('aria-selected', 'false').attr('tabindex', -1)
                                    .eq(data.newValue - 1).addClass("aplus-carousel-active").attr('aria-selected', 'true').attr('tabindex', 0);
                });

                function syncPaginationDotsWithCarouselPages(numPages) {
                    const parentElement = document.querySelector(paginationGroup);
                    if (parentElement && parentElement.children) {
                        const children = parentElement.children;
                        for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i++) {
                            if (i >= numPages) {
                                // If number of dots > num of pages, we should hide other dots
                                children[i].classList.add('aplus-pagination-dot--display-none');
                            } else if (children[i].classList.contains('aplus-pagination-dot--display-none')) {
                                // Reset display of dots if it was hidden before
                                children[i].classList.remove('aplus-pagination-dot--display-none');
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

                framework.onInit(carouselName, function (carousel) {
                    try {
                        var totalPages = carousel.getAttr('totalPages');
                        syncPaginationDotsWithCarouselPages(totalPages);
                        /* Resize event handler to re-calculate the pagination dots count based on orientation */
                        window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
                            carousel.resize();
                            totalPages = carousel.getAttr('totalPages');
                            syncPaginationDotsWithCarouselPages(totalPages);
                        });

                        A.declarative(paginationAction, 'click keydown', function(event){
                            var isClick = event.type === 'click';
                            var isKeydown = event.type === 'keydown';
                            var isEnter = isKeydown && event.$event.keyCode === ENTER_KEY_CODE;
                            var isEsc = isKeydown && event.$event.keyCode === ESCAPE_KEY_CODE;
                            var isLeftArrow = isKeydown && event.$event.keyCode === LEFT_ARROW_KEY;
                            var isRightArrow = isKeydown && event.$event.keyCode === RIGHT_ARROW_KEY;
                            var isHome = isKeydown && event.$event.keyCode === HOME_KEY;
                            var isEnd = isKeydown && event.$event.keyCode === END_KEY;

                            if (isClick || isEnter) {
                                var data = event.data;
                                carousel.gotoPage(data.page);
                            } else if (isEsc) {
                                event.$target.blur();
                            } else if (isLeftArrow || isRightArrow || isHome || isEnd) {
                                event.$event.preventDefault();
                                const dots = A.$(paginationGroup + " .carousel-slider-circle");
                                const currentIndex = dots.index(event.$target);
                                let nextIndex;

                                if (isLeftArrow) {
                                    nextIndex = currentIndex > 0 ? currentIndex - 1 : dots.length - 1;
                                } else if (isRightArrow) {
                                    nextIndex = currentIndex < dots.length - 1 ? currentIndex + 1 : 0;
                                } else if (isHome) {
                                    nextIndex = 0;
                                } else if (isEnd) {
                                    nextIndex = dots.length - 1;
                                }

                                dots.eq(nextIndex).focus();
                                carousel.gotoPage(nextIndex + 1);
                            }
                        });
                    } catch (e) {
                        P.log('Failed to init ' + carouselName + '. Error: ' + e.message, 'FATAL', 'AplusModuleResources');
                    }
                });
            });
        }
    });
});
</script>
     <div class="aplus-mantle aplus-module">
        <div class="aplus-carousel-nav">
            <ul id="aplus-pagination-group-6-premium-aplus-13-carousel-6" class="aplus-pagination-dots" aria-label="tablist-section" role="tablist">

this laptop has become an indispensable tool for my work. It is incredibly user-friendly, with smooth performance that handles all my office tasks effortlessly—from creating documents and sending important emails to participating in video conferences with clients. What stands out most is its exceptional portability: it is slim, lightweight, and easy to carry, making it perfect for my constant trips between cities. It fits comfortably in my briefcase without adding extra burden, allowing me to work anytime and anywhere. I have already recommended this laptop to my colleagues who also travel frequently. It is reliable, practical, and well-suited to the demands of modern on-the-go work. I am extremely satisfied and will highly recommend it to anyone in need of a quality work laptop.</div><div class="_Y3Itb_cr-sidepanel-container-gradient_1zm2j Wallace</span></div></a></div><div class="_Y3Itd_single-review-star-rating-bar-desktop_1T97A"><i data-hook="review-star-rating" class="a-icon a-icon-star a-star-5"><span class="a-icon-alt">5 out of 5 stars</span></i><span class="a-letter-space"></span></div><a class="a-size-base a-color-base a-link-normal a-text-bold" href="/review/R1HR8K7E8DAZP5/ref=cm_cr_dp_d_rvw_ttl?ie=UTF8"><h5 class="_Y3Itd_single-review-title_2aKRE" data-hook="reviewTitle" lang="en-US">Great, inexpensive laptop!</h5></a><div data-hook="review-by-line" class="a-row a-spacing-none"><span data-hook="review-date" class="a-size-base a-color-tertiary">Reviewed in the United States on August 3, 2024</span></div><div data-hook="product-variation-attributes" class="a-row a-spacing-mini"><span class="_Y3Itd_inline-contributor_33jDb"><div data-hook="review-badges"><span data-hook="vine-review-badge" class="a-size-mini a-color-success a-text-bold">Vine Customer Review of Free Product</span></div></span></div><div data-hook="reviewTextContainer" class="_Y3Itd_single-review-text-container_325WM"><div data-hook="reviewText" class="a-cardui-deck _Y3Itd_card-deck_37S9P" data-a-remove-top-gutter="true" data-a-remove-bottom-gutter="true"><div class="a-teaser-describedby-collapsed a-hidden">Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.</div><div class="a-teaser-describedby-expanded a-hidden">Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.</div><div data-csa-c-slot-id="true" data-csa-c-type="element" class="a-cardui _Y3Itd_peek-expand_3G9Ub" data-a-card-type="peekExpand"><div class="a-cardui-body _Y3Itd_no-padding_1A9ha"><div class="a-reactive-container"><div><div class="a-cardui-content a-cardui-uninitialized" data-a-max-height="300" style="max-height:300px"><div class="_Y3Itd_relative_1SChh"><div data-hook="reviewRichContentContainer" lang="en-US" class="_Y3Itd_contain-rich-content_2IORW"><p><span>For such an inexpensive laptop, I wasn&#x27;t expecting too much, but this laptop is surprisingly powerful and feature-rich.  There&#x27;s a couple of things I don&#x27;t like (they&#x27;re minor) and I&#x27;ll explain them later but they&#x27;re minor issues</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>I&#x27;ll begin by telling you everything I do like:</span></p><p><span>1) Setup was easy...turn it on and follow the prompts -- includes Win 11!</span></p><p><span>2) The full-sized keyboard is a plus -- you get the arrow keys and a full numberpad. The keyboard is also backlit (Fn + Space)!</span></p><p><span>3) The screen is nice and bright and has a good viewing range -- and it&#x27;s a touchscreen!</span></p><p><span>4) I&#x27;ve had no problems streaming any video services like Amazon Prime Video or Netflix.</span></p><p><span>5) The built-in fingerprint reader works very well and is fully integrated into Windows Hello.</span></p><p><span>6) It includes two regular USB ports and a mini-HDMI port.</span></p><p><span>7) The laptop boots quickly and is thin and lightweight.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>The things I don&#x27;t like (and these are somewhat minor -- remember the price point!):</span></p><p><span>1) There are no USB-C ports -- this doesn&#x27;t mean you can&#x27;t use USB-C devices, you&#x27;ll just need a USB-C to USB-A adapter.</span></p><p><span>2) The charger seems a bit proprietary, again USC-B could have fixed this, but again, minor issue.</span></p><p><span>3) mini-HDMI will require a special cable or adpapter to plug in any external monitor.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>This is a very capable laptop and works great for office-use, streaming, and just plain old web surfing.</span></p></div></div></div></div><div class="a-reactive-container-gradient"></div></div></div><div class="a-teaser-describedby-expanded a-hidden">Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.</div><div data-csa-c-slot-id="true" data-csa-c-type="element" class="a-cardui data-a-max-height="300" style="max-height:300px"><div class="_Y3Itd_relative_1SChh"><div data-hook="reviewRichContentContainer" lang="en-US" class="_Y3Itd_contain-rich-content_2IORW"><p><span>I&#x27;m not tech-savvy by any means, so I can only give you my experience with this computer as a person who has owned 3 laptops in my life.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>First thing I noticed about it is how heavy it is compared to my other laptop. For the size, this one has some weight. It actually feels more solid and durable than my HP laptop.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>Second thing I noticed is that the touch screen feels very responsive and...precise? Regarding where I touch the screen vs where it clicks. Feels quality, like the screen on my phone.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>Startup was quick and easy, with the typical windows setup you expect, except I ran into an issue with connecting to the wifi. It was required for setup, yet it wouldn&#x27;t connect so kept taking me in a loop.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>Once I got past all that, I put it to the test by downloading and running a few apps. Here, you could see why it&#x27;s an affordable laptop. I ran into several lags and freezes when trying to run a few apps at a time, and have needed to restart about five times so far.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>If you&#x27;re keeping it really basic, like writing, email, surfing the web, or homework assignments and such, this will likely work just fine for you. If you have needs beyond that, you will likely want more than this laptop can offer you.</span></p></div></div></div></div><div class="a-reactive-container-gradient"></div></div></div><div Reviewer</span></div></a></div><div class="a-section a-spacing-none"><div class="_Y3Itd_single-review-star-rating-bar-desktop_1T97A"><i data-hook="review-star-rating" class="a-icon a-icon-star a-star-5"><span class="a-icon-alt">5 out of 5 stars</span></i><span class="a-letter-space"></span></div><a class="a-size-base a-color-base a-link-normal a-text-bold" href="/review/R1VN2BCC3SWA8/ref=cm_cr_dp_d_rvw_ttl?ie=UTF8"><h5 class="_Y3Itd_single-review-title_2aKRE" data-hook="reviewTitle" lang="en-US">Good for the price</h5></a><div data-hook="review-by-line" class="a-row a-spacing-none"><span data-hook="review-date" class="a-size-base a-color-tertiary">Reviewed in the United States on September 10, 2024</span></div><div data-hook="product-variation-attributes" class="a-row a-spacing-mini"><span class="_Y3Itd_inline-contributor_33jDb"><div data-hook="review-badges"><span data-hook="vine-review-badge" class="a-size-mini a-color-success a-text-bold">Vine Customer Review of Free Product</span></div></span></div></div><p><span>I&#x27;m not tech-savvy by any means, so I can only give you my experience with this computer as a person who has owned 3 laptops in my life.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>First thing I noticed about it is how heavy it is compared to my other laptop. For the size, this one has some weight. It actually feels more solid and durable than my HP laptop.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>Second thing I noticed is that the touch screen feels very responsive and...precise? Regarding where I touch the screen vs where it clicks. Feels quality, like the screen on my phone.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>Startup was quick and easy, with the typical windows setup you expect, except I ran into an issue with connecting to the wifi. It was required for setup, yet it wouldn&#x27;t connect so kept taking me in a loop.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>Once I got past all that, I put it to the test by downloading and running a few apps. Here, you could see why it&#x27;s an affordable laptop. I ran into several lags and freezes when trying to run a few apps at a time, and have needed to restart about five times so far.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>If you&#x27;re keeping it really basic, like writing, email, surfing the web, or homework assignments and such, this will likely work just fine for you. If you have needs beyond that, you will likely want more than this laptop can offer you.</span></p><ul class="_Y3Itd_media-popover-thumbnail-image-container_2nWBS" bueno</h5><div data-hook="review-by-line" class="a-row a-spacing-none"><span data-hook="review-date" class="a-size-base a-color-tertiary">Reviewed in Spain on August 30, 2024</span></div><div data-hook="product-variation-attributes" class="a-row a-spacing-mini"><span class="_Y3Itd_inline-contributor_33jDb"><div data-hook="review-badges"><span data-hook="vine-review-badge" class="_Y3Itd_single-review-text-container_325WM"><div data-hook="reviewText" class="a-cardui-deck _Y3Itd_card-deck_37S9P" data-a-remove-top-gutter="true" data-a-remove-bottom-gutter="true"><div class="a-teaser-describedby-collapsed a-hidden">Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.</div><div class="a-teaser-describedby-expanded a-hidden">Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.</div><div data-csa-c-slot-id="true" data-csa-c-type="element" class="a-cardui _Y3Itd_peek-expand_3G9Ub" data-a-card-type="peekExpand"><div class="a-cardui-body _Y3Itd_no-padding_1A9ha"><div class="a-reactive-container"><div><div class="a-cardui-content a-cardui-uninitialized" data-a-max-height="300" style="max-height:300px"><div class="_Y3Itd_relative_1SChh"><div data-hook="reviewRichContentContainer" lang="es-ES" class="_Y3Itd_contain-rich-content_2IORW"><p><span>Morostron - Ordenador portátil táctil (13,5 pulgadas, Win11,16 GB, RAM 256 GB, SSD, Celeron N95 Quad Core,FHD IPS 3000x2000, teclado retroiluminado, desbloqueo de huellas dactilares</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>El portátil es realmente pequeño. Se le ve bien acabado y de buena calidad. Dado su tamaño reducido es ideal para llevar en la mochila o la carpeta a cualquier parte. Como no se indica en el anuncio, te lo digo, el teclado es en inglés, retroiluminado. Pero se suministran unas fundas de silicona para ponerlo en varios idiomas, entre los que se encuentra el español.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>Me ha gustado:</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Pantalla. Buena resolución y encima es táctil.</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Tiene lector de huellas.</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Teclado iluminado.</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Batería de 3 a 4 horas.</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Disco duro SSD</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Pequeño y ligero, lo que lo hace ideal para llevar a cualquier sitio.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>No me ha gustado:</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Pocos puertos en los laterales.</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Tamaño del SSD muy pequeño, aunque siempre se puede ampliar.</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Que haya que poner una funda de silicona en el teclado para tenerlo en español.</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Que no se puede girar 360 grados el teclado para usarlo en modo tablet ya que la pantalla es táctil.</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Que el conector de carga no sea USB C.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>No obstante, dado el bajo precio del portátil, creo que es una buena compra si sabes sus fallos. Por ese precio no creo que se pueda comprar nada mucho mejor.</span></p></div></div></div></div><div class="a-reactive-container-gradient"></div></div></div><div class="a-icon a-icon-star a-star-5"><span class="a-icon-alt">5 out of 5 stars</span></i><span class="a-letter-space"></span></div><h5 class="_Y3Itd_single-review-title_2aKRE" data-hook="reviewTitle" lang="es-ES">Muy bueno</h5><div data-hook="review-by-line" class="a-row a-spacing-none"><span data-hook="review-date" class="a-size-base a-color-tertiary">Reviewed in Spain on August 30, 2024</span></div><div data-hook="product-variation-attributes" class="a-row a-spacing-mini"><span class="_Y3Itd_inline-contributor_33jDb"><div data-hook="review-badges"><span data-hook="vine-review-badge" class="a-size-mini a-color-success a-text-bold">Vine Customer Review of Free Product</span></div></span></div></div><p><span>Morostron - Ordenador portátil táctil (13,5 pulgadas, Win11,16 GB, RAM 256 GB, SSD, Celeron N95 Quad Core,FHD IPS 3000x2000, teclado retroiluminado, desbloqueo de huellas dactilares</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>El portátil es realmente pequeño. Se le ve bien acabado y de buena calidad. Dado su tamaño reducido es ideal para llevar en la mochila o la carpeta a cualquier parte. Como no se indica en el anuncio, te lo digo, el teclado es en inglés, retroiluminado. Pero se suministran unas fundas de silicona para ponerlo en varios idiomas, entre los que se encuentra el español.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>Me ha gustado:</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Pantalla. Buena resolución y encima es táctil.</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Tiene lector de huellas.</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Teclado iluminado.</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Batería de 3 a 4 horas.</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Disco duro SSD</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Pequeño y ligero, lo que lo hace ideal para llevar a cualquier sitio.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>No me ha gustado:</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Pocos puertos en los laterales.</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Tamaño del SSD muy pequeño, aunque siempre se puede ampliar.</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Que haya que poner una funda de silicona en el teclado para tenerlo en español.</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Que no se puede girar 360 grados el teclado para usarlo en modo tablet ya que la pantalla es táctil.</span></p><p><span>&gt;&gt;&gt;Que el conector de carga no sea USB C.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>No obstante, dado el bajo precio del portátil, creo que es una buena compra si sabes sus fallos. Por ese precio no creo que se pueda comprar nada mucho mejor.</span></p><ul class="_Y3Itd_media-popover-thumbnail-image-container_2nWBS" data-reviewbind="MediaThumbnailsBlock"><li d="M36 30L44 24V36L36 30Z" fill="white"></path></svg></div></div><div data-hook="reviewRichContentContainer" lang="en-GB" class="_Y3Itd_contain-rich-content_2IORW"><p><span>This laptop features a sleek, high-end design with its full metal body and silver-gray tone, making it stand out as a fashion-forward choice. Its slim profile is notably thinner than my previous Lenovo notebook, almost half the thickness. With a 13.5-inch screen and narrow bezels, it boasts a compact overall size that&#x27;s incredibly convenient to carry around. The keyboard, equipped with three membrane covers and backlit keys, ensures easy typing even in low-light conditions. （as shown in the video)</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>With a RAM installed size of 16 GB, the actual RAM capacity is 237 GB, slightly lower than the advertised 256 GB. Additionally, there seems to be a discrepancy between the RAM capacity stated in the product description and the one shown in the product images, where it&#x27;s mentioned as 512 GB. (as shown in the picture) This inconsistency could potentially mislead buyers.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>The laptop features four small anti-slip pads on the bottom, with the exhaust fan located primarily in the middle. Its touch screen is highly responsive, allowing for smooth and seamless operation, complemented by the convenient fingerprint recognition for easy unlocking. Overall, it delivers an excellent user experience, with a natural color display and smooth performance, all at a reasonable price of £299.99.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>However, it&#x27;s worth noting that the initial setup process can be somewhat cumbersome, and there&#x27;s a notable issue with the power plug not fully inserted, leaving a portion exposed, which could pose some safety concerns.</span></p></div></div></div></div><div class="a-reactive-container-gradient"></div></div></div><div data-hook="reviewExpandButtonContainer" class="a-cardui-footer src="https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/amazon-avatars-global/c3e1dcba-d663-4802-997f-b9ed1df91757._CR58%2C0%2C384%2C384_SX460_SX48_.jpg"/></noscript></div></div><div class="a-profile-content"><span class="a-profile-name">Sophie</span></div></a></div><div class="a-section a-spacing-none"><div class="_Y3Itd_single-review-star-rating-bar-desktop_1T97A"><i data-hook="review-star-rating" class="a-icon a-icon-star a-star-4"><span class="a-icon-alt">4 out of 5 stars</span></i><span class="a-letter-space"></span></div><h5 class="_Y3Itd_single-review-title_2aKRE" data-hook="reviewTitle" lang="en-GB">Touchscreen laptop , solid performance with  minor flaws</h5><div data-hook="review-by-line" class="a-row a-spacing-none"><span data-hook="review-date" class="a-size-base a-color-tertiary">Reviewed in the United Kingdom on June 7, 2024</span></div><div data-hook="product-variation-attributes" class="a-row a-spacing-mini"><span class="_Y3Itd_inline-contributor_33jDb"><div data-hook="review-badges"><span data-hook="vine-review-badge" class="a-size-mini a-color-success a-text-bold">Vine Customer Review of Free Product</span></div></span></div></div><p><span>This laptop features a sleek, high-end design with its full metal body and silver-gray tone, making it stand out as a fashion-forward choice. Its slim profile is notably thinner than my previous Lenovo notebook, almost half the thickness. With a 13.5-inch screen and narrow bezels, it boasts a compact overall size that&#x27;s incredibly convenient to carry around. The keyboard, equipped with three membrane covers and backlit keys, ensures easy typing even in low-light conditions. （as shown in the video)</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>With a RAM installed size of 16 GB, the actual RAM capacity is 237 GB, slightly lower than the advertised 256 GB. Additionally, there seems to be a discrepancy between the RAM capacity stated in the product description and the one shown in the product images, where it&#x27;s mentioned as 512 GB. (as shown in the picture) This inconsistency could potentially mislead buyers.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>The laptop features four small anti-slip pads on the bottom, with the exhaust fan located primarily in the middle. Its touch screen is highly responsive, allowing for smooth and seamless operation, complemented by the convenient fingerprint recognition for easy unlocking. Overall, it delivers an excellent user experience, with a natural color display and smooth performance, all at a reasonable price of £299.99.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>However, it&#x27;s worth noting that the initial setup process can be somewhat cumbersome, and there&#x27;s a notable issue with the power plug not fully inserted, leaving a portion exposed, which could pose some safety concerns.</span></p><ul class="_Y3Itd_media-popover-thumbnail-image-container_2nWBS" data-reviewbind="MediaThumbnailsBlock"><li class="_Y3Itd_media-popover-list-item-style_d1lj6" d="M36 30L44 24V36L36 30Z" fill="white"></path></svg></div></div><div data-hook="reviewRichContentContainer" lang="en-GB" class="_Y3Itd_contain-rich-content_2IORW"><p><span>A small, compact, and lightweight laptop great to use on the go.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>The backlit keyboard and fingerprint access are lovely additions. I also like the high-resolution display; it’s great for everyday use but also works wonderfully for watching movies!</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>The laptop is mostly made of aluminum, which gives it a light, sleek, and aesthetically pleasing look.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>I found that some controls are different from how they&#x27;re labeled on the keyboard, though this may be because it&#x27;s made for different countries. Some of the different controls I’ve noticed are Shift+2 = “ and Shift+&#x27; = @. I wonder if I can change it from the settings...</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>Also, the sound quality isn’t the best—you’ll get the expected sound quality at this price point. Either way, this isn&#x27;t a problem for me as I tend to wear earphones/headphones, but if this is something you value, do bear this in mind.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>A great choice for everyday use!</span></p></div></div></div></div><div class="a-reactive-container-gradient"></div></div></div><div data-hook="reviewExpandButtonContainer" class="a-cardui-footer data-hook="review-by-line" class="a-row a-spacing-none"><span data-hook="review-date" class="a-size-base a-color-tertiary">Reviewed in the United Kingdom on July 7, 2024</span></div><div class="a-size-mini a-color-success a-text-bold">Vine Customer Review of Free Product</span></div></span></div></div><p><span>A small, compact, and lightweight laptop great to use on the go.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>The backlit keyboard and fingerprint access are lovely additions. I also like the high-resolution display; it’s great for everyday use but also works wonderfully for watching movies!</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>The laptop is mostly made of aluminum, which gives it a light, sleek, and aesthetically pleasing look.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>I found that some controls are different from how they&#x27;re labeled on the keyboard, though this may be because it&#x27;s made for different countries. Some of the different controls I’ve noticed are Shift+2 = “ and Shift+&#x27; = @. I wonder if I can change it from the settings...</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>Also, the sound quality isn’t the best—you’ll get the expected sound quality at this price point. Either way, this isn&#x27;t a problem for me as I tend to wear earphones/headphones, but if this is something you value, do bear this in mind.</span></p><p><span></span></p><p><span>A great choice for everyday use!</span></p><ul class="_Y3Itd_media-popover-thumbnail-image-container_2nWBS" data-reviewbind="MediaThumbnailsBlock"><li class="_Y3Itd_media-popover-list-item-style_d1lj6"
